dominant_hues: vibrant colors favored for TV screen visibility

distinctive_elements: three playable Vikings with unique visual identities
puzzle-platform visual hierarchy emphasizing character abilities
color palette constrained by console onscreen color limits

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor Lost Vikings SNES article
wikipedia - The Lost Vikings development and visual design notes
notes: T2 tier data: empirical/qualitative only. Development notes indicate console color limits influenced palette design with preference for vibrant colors for TV visibility. Larger character sprites chosen over hundreds of tiny Vikings due to console display constraints. No specific sprite dimensions, animation frame counts, or exact palette data documented in sources.
